name: SGLang OpenAI Server
description: Registers a local SGLang OpenAI-compatible server as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback loopback SGLang OpenAI-compatible base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:30000/v1.
Optional fallback bearer token matching SGLang's --api-key option when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional comma-separated SGLang model IDs exposed by the local server when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: SGLang base URL
settings.description: Loopback OpenAI-compatible base URL for SGLang. Defaults to http://localhost:30000/v1 and is restricted by the plugin to localhost, 127.0.0.1, or ::1 /v1 URLs.

settings.label: SGLang API token
settings.description: Optional bearer token matching SGLang's --api-key option. Falls back to SGLANG_API_KEY.

settings.label: SGLang model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the local SGLang server. Use IDs returned by SGLang /v1/models, --served-model-name, or the loaded model name. Falls back to comma-separated SGLANG_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: SGLang OpenAI Server
providers.description: Registers configured local SGLang OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
